response.step_by_step_log:
1. Identified the song as '紅蓮華' (Gurenge) based on on-screen text. 
2. Resolved metadata: Composer is Kayoko Kusano (草野華余子), Performer is an unidentified VTuber.
3. Searched for official Japanese lyrics and English translation of '紅蓮華' using the composer's name.
4. Mapped the song performance to the first scene (00:00 to 03:44).
5. Identified the second scene (03:44 to 04:59) as a dialogue segment without music.
6. Compiled all information into the requested JSON format.
response.global_summary: The video features a virtual performance of the song '紅蓮華' (Gurenge) originally by LiSA, with music by Kayoko Kusano. The performer appears to be a VTuber character in a scene set against a burning village. Following the musical performance, there is a dialogue sequence between two VTuber characters discussing the destroyed village and the monster responsible.

scenes.description: Virtual performance of '紅蓮華' by a VTuber character against a background of a burning village. Music credits 'Music: 草野華余子' (Kayoko Kusano) are displayed.

scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
I've learned the reason I can become stronger
Take me with you, move forward
I'm intoxicated by the mud-covered lantern slides
This stubborn heart and trembling hands
There is something I want to grab, that's all
Even if I glare at the night sky, staring into the sky
The only thing I can change is myself, that's all
I've learned the reason I can become stronger
Take me with you, move forward
Even with dreams that can never be erased no matter what
Even in this present moment that I cannot stop
If I can become stronger for the sake of someone
Thank you, sorrow
Beaten down by the world, I learned the meaning of losing
Bloom proudly, crimson lotus!
Light up my fate
The noise of lightning pierces my ears
My confused heart is not enough just by being gentle
There are things I cannot protect
I know, but
Good and evil tangled below the surface
Divine punishment for the transparent hypocrisy
(Tell me why, tell me why, tell me why, tell me, I don't need you)
Than a talented flower
It is more beautiful to be the one single flower that kept challenging and bloomed
Even the road covered in thorns, violently spread
It only appears to the real me
So I will show I can overcome it
Even the dreams that were easily put away and could not be protected
Taking root in the crimson heart
Residing in this blood
Secretly and fleetingly, the ending of scattering
Ruthlessly broken, the wind of screams blows
Someone's laughing shadow, someone's crying voice
Everyone is wishing for happiness
Even with dreams that can never be erased no matter what
Even in this present moment that I cannot stop
If I can become stronger for the sake of someone
Thank you, sorrow
Beaten down by the world, I learned the meaning of losing
Bloom proudly, crimson lotus!
Light up my fate

scenes.description: The music ends, and two VTuber characters continue the video with a conversation about the destruction of the village caused by a monster.
